appliedUpdates.description: Added documentation about duration strings needing to be quoted in NATS config output (lexer interprets numeric+letter suffix as size-suffixed integers)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to Coding Conventions: mention the Marshaler (MarshalConfig() ([]byte, error)) and Unmarshaler (UnmarshalConfig(v any) error) interfaces as public API in conf/v2. Future workers implementing types that need custom marshal/unmarshal should know about these interfaces.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: conf/v2/marshal.go:33-35 defines Marshaler interface, conf/v2/unmarshal.go defines Unmarshaler interface. These are public APIs not mentioned in AGENTS.md coding conventions. Flagged by marshal-core reviewer.

rejectedObservations.observation: Inconsistent Raw field population pattern across AST node types (IntegerNode always vs Float/Bool/Datetime conditionally vs StringNode never)
rejectedObservations.reason: Too implementation-specific; this is an internal AST detail that doesn't affect other workers. Already noted as non-blocking code quality issue in the review.

rejectedObservations.observation: Dead AST fields (rawSep on KeyNode, Raw on IncludeNode) added but never wired up
rejectedObservations.reason: Already captured as non-blocking issues in the ast-emission-roundtrip review. Not systemic — these are specific code quality items, not guidance gaps.

rejectedObservations.observation: Task description referenced cross_area_test.go but actual file is cross_test.go
rejectedObservations.reason: Minor reference inconsistency in the task description, not a code or guidance issue. No action needed.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker deviated from strict TDD for integration tests (wrote tests after reading implementation)
rejectedObservations.reason: Reviewer explicitly noted this is a reasonable deviation for integration tests that compose already-implemented functions. No skill change warranted.
